# Transcript
AN*
MA DHMO* *** **
FIZEN ANTIMENH
KAI SYMPROEDROI E
DHMWI  FILEAS FI ** *
PALLHNEYS EIPEN  EEIDH EYX
ENIDHS DIATELEI YNOYS WN T
WI DHMWI TWI AQH* *** KAI TA
S TE EISFORAS AP AS OSAS EU
HFISTAI O DHMOS * SENEGKEI
* TOYS METOIKOYS * TAKTWS
*SENHNOCEN KAI EN TWI POLE
*I TWI PROTERON EQ*LONTHS
AYTAS DWDEKA ENEBI*ASEN K*
* NYN EIS TOYS KATAPA*TAS N
RAS EPEDWKEN KAI OSA *PET*
CQH AYTWI YPO TWN STRAT*GWN
KAI TWN TAXIARCWN APAN** **
OQYMWS YPHRETHKEN KAI T* *
LA DIATELEI FILOTIMOYME*
S EIS THN BOYLHN KAI TON DHM*
N TON AQHNAIWN DEDOCQAI TW*
DHMWI EPAINESAI EYXENIDHN
EYPOLIDOS FASHLITHN KAI ST
EFANWSAI QALLOY STEFANWI E
NOIAS ENEKA KAI FILOTIMIA
THS EIS TON DHMON KAI EINAI
N ISOTELH KAI AYTON KA*
**IAS AYTOIS
**IN OP
